meaning: n.钥匙,关键,解答,(打字机等的)键,调子,对译本,(开钟表、发条的)栓,要害vt.调节...的音调,锁上,插上栓,提供线索vi.使用钥匙n.[乐]键,调,基调
examples: He turned the key in the lock.
The key doesn't fit the lock.
It also identifies key priorities for further investment and stronger commitment in the future.
But the key to this, it said, were two factors: remaining active and maintaining friendships.
